tasks.label: Android: install debug
tasks.detail: Requires a connected Android device or a running emulator.

tasks.label: Android: instrumentation tests
tasks.detail: Requires a connected Android device or a running emulator.

tasks.label: Android: Start Emulator
tasks.command: /home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb start-server; AVD=$(/home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -list-avds | head -n 1); if [ -z "$AVD" ]; then echo 'No AVD found! Please create one first.'; exit 1; fi; echo "Starting headless AVD: $AVD"; /home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd "$AVD" -gpu swiftshader_indirect -no-audio -no-snapshot-load -no-window -qemu -lcd-density 160
tasks.detail: Starts the first available Android Emulator without the Qt window/sidebar. Use scrcpy to mirror it if you need an interactive screen.

tasks.label: Android: Mirror Emulator (scrcpy)
tasks.command: command -v scrcpy >/dev/null || { echo 'scrcpy not found. Install it with: sudo pacman -S scrcpy'; exit 127; }; SERIAL=$(/home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb devices | awk '/^emulator-/{print $1; exit}'); if [ -z "$SERIAL" ]; then echo 'No running emulator found. Run Android: Start Emulator first.'; exit 1; fi; scrcpy --serial "$SERIAL" --max-size 1200 --window-title "$SERIAL"
tasks.detail: Mirrors a running headless emulator as a plain Android screen. Requires scrcpy.

tasks.label: Android: Start Emulator (Qt window)
tasks.command: /home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb start-server; export QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb; AVD=$(/home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -list-avds | head -n 1); if [ -z "$AVD" ]; then echo 'No AVD found! Please create one first.'; exit 1; fi; echo "Starting AVD with Qt window: $AVD"; /home/luoyu/Android/Sdk/emulator/emulator -avd "$AVD" -gpu auto -no-audio -no-snapshot-load -qemu -lcd-density 160
tasks.detail: Fallback launcher using the regular Android Emulator Qt window, including its toolbar/sidebar.

tasks.label: Android: Stop Emulator
tasks.detail: Stops the currently running Android Emulator.

tasks.label: Android: 1. Download System Image (API 34)
tasks.detail: Downloads Android 14 (API 34) system image. Only needs to be run once.

tasks.label: Android: 2. Create AVD
tasks.detail: Creates an Android Virtual Device using API 34. Run after downloading the system image.
